shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "react-datepicker selectsRange out-of-month filler in-selecting-range highlight" --limit 5'
/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"<Day|monthShowsDuplicate|isAfterMonth|outside-month|renderDay\" src/month.tsx src/week.tsx && sed -n '430,760p' src/month.tsx && sed -n '1,260p' src/week.tsx"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '95,125p' src/date_utils.ts && rg -n \"setSystemTime|fakeTimers|202[0-9].*Date|TZ\" src/test setup* jest* package.json"
/bin/bash -lc 'git diff --check && git diff --stat && git diff -- src/day.tsx src/test/day_test.test.tsx'
/bin/bash -lc 'rg -n "Date Range - Handle null start date|setSystemTime" src/test/datepicker_test.test.tsx | head -20'
/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "Day component month prop in-selecting-range outside month filler" --limit 5'

/bin/bash -lc "nmem --json m add \"In react-datepicker, Day.isInSelectingRange must first verify that the cell date's month matches the Month component's month prop. Calendar grids include adjacent-month filler cells, and date-range interval checks alone otherwise mark those cells with react-datepicker__day--in-selecting-range. The guard belongs in src/day.tsx so it also prevents selecting-range start/end modifiers from being applied to filler cells. Standalone Day tests must provide a realistic month prop (getMonth(day)).\" -t \"Exclude adjacent-month filler cells from range preview\" --unit-type decision -l bugfix -s codex -i 0.8"

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
